channel.title: Faiz Ahmed Faiz on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Faiz Ahmed Faiz on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: nasib aajmaane ke din aa rahe hain
item.description:
nasib aajmaane ke din aa rahe hain karib unke aane ke din aa rahe hain

jo dil se kaha hai, jo dil se suna hai sab unko sunane ke din aa rahe hain

abhi se dil-o-jaan sar-e-raah rakh do k lutne-lutaane ke din aa rahe hain

tapkane lagi un nigahon se masti nigahein churane ke din aa rahe hain

sabaa fir hamein poochti fir rahi hai chaman ko sajaane ke din aa rahe hain (sabaa=breeze)

item.title: aashiqi...
item.description:
A beautiful poem by Faiz Ahmed Faiz:

woh log bahut khushkismat the jo ishq ko kaam samjhte the ya kaam se aashiqi karte the hum jeete ji mashroof rahe kuch ishq kiya, kuch kaam kiya kaam ishq ke aade aata raha aur ishq se kaam uljhata raha phir aakhir mein tang akar humne dono ko adhoora chod diya…

Comments

Comment by Bal on 2008-12-16 18:02:13 +0530

eh te kmaal hai hai yaar…
never read thing like this! Beauty !
